questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
Paragraph: In the following P-V diagram, two adiabatics cut two isothermals at $T_1$ and $\mathrm{T}_2 .2$ moles of an ideal diatomic gas is taken through the cyclic process ABCDA.
Question: If $Q_1$ is heat absorbed and $Q_2$ is heat rejected in one cycle then-
questions.solution: $Q_1=n R T_1 \ln \left(\frac{V_B}{V_A}\right) ; Q_2=n R T_2 \ln \left(\frac{V_D}{V_C}\right)$ But $\frac{V_D}{V_C}=\frac{V_A}{V_B}$ so $Q_2=n R T_2 \ln \left(\frac{V_B}{V_A}\right) \Rightarrow \frac{Q_1}{Q_2}=\frac{T_1}{T_2}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
Paragraph: In the following P-V diagram, two adiabatics cut two isothermals at $T_1$ and $\mathrm{T}_2 .2$ moles of an ideal diatomic gas is taken through the cyclic process ABCDA.
Question: In which process heat is absorbed by the gas.
questions.solution:
As $B C \& A D$ are adiabatics so $Q_{B C}=Q_{D A}=0$
For $\mathrm{AB}, \mathrm{W}\gt0 \& \Delta \mathrm{U}=0 \Rightarrow \mathrm{Q}_{\mathrm{AB}}\gt0$; For $\mathrm{CD}, \mathrm{W} \lt 0 \& \Delta \mathrm{U}=0 \Rightarrow \mathrm{Q}_{\mathrm{CD}} \lt 0$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
Paragraph: The dot in figure represents the initial state of a gas. An adiabatic divides the $\mathrm{p}-\mathrm{V}$ diagram into regions 1 and 2 as shown.
Question: For which of the following processes, the corresponding heat supplied to the system Q is positive
options: the gas moves up along the adiabatic,
it moves down along the adiabatic,
it moves to anywhere in region 1 ,
it moves to anywhere in region 2 .
questions.solution:
Above adiabatic graph heat has to be supplied.
Since product of $\mathrm{P}_0 \mathrm{~V}_0$ decreases so temperature will decrease.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
Paragraph: Figure shows the variation of the internal energy $U$ with the density $\rho$ of one mole of ideal monoatomic gas for a thermodynamics cycle $A B C A$. Here process $A B$ is a part of rectangular hyperbola
Question: The P-V diagram of above process
questions.solution:
process $A B U \rho=$ constant
$\frac{P}{\rho}=\frac{R T}{M}$ and $U \propto t$
$\Rightarrow \quad P=$ const
Process BC $\rightarrow$ isochoric
Process CA $\rightarrow$ isothermal
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Physics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q:
Paragraph: Figure shows the variation of the internal energy $U$ with the density $\rho$ of one mole of ideal monoatomic gas for a thermodynamics cycle $A B C A$. Here process $A B$ is a part of rectangular hyperbola
Question: The P-V diagram of above process
questions.solution: $\begin{aligned} & \text { Process } A B U \rho=\text { constant } \\ & \frac{P}{\rho}=\frac{R T}{M} \text { and } U \propto t \\ & \Rightarrow P=\text { const } \\ & \text { Process } B C \rightarrow \text { isochoric } \\ & \text { Process } C A \rightarrow \text { isothermal }\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
